description: Money-impact proposal with trusted provenance passes the verifier under default PipelineOptions. The legacy trust='trusted' model is accepted in v0.8.x (with a deprecation warning that is not asserted by this vector). strict_trust-mode sanitization would change the outcome for this proposal; evidence-mode verification is out of scope here and is deferred to v0.8.1+ conformance.
source: adapted from tests/conftest.py money_proposal fixture (make_proposal() with defaults); exercises the rule that under default PipelineOptions, provenance.trust='trusted' is sufficient for money-impact proposals to pass the verifier
